sentences.text: Shen dashed past a shy hadrosaur and Sharon sheltered it.
Sharon washed the shiny Allosaur armor on the shelf.
Shep crushed a fossil and Sharon sheltered a shiny raptor.
Shen and Shep dashed to shelter a shaggy predator.
Sharon shut the shed and Shep sheltered the shaggy hadrosaur.
A shy shaggy Allosaur rushed past Shen and the shed.
Shep washed the shiny dorsal armor and Sharon rushed in.
Shen sheltered a shaggy swift raptor at the shed.
Sharon dashed past a predator and Shep shut the shed.
Shen washed a shiny Stego dorsal and Sharon washed it.
Shep saw a shaggy Allosaur and Sharon shut the shed.
Sharon sheltered a shiny hadrosaur and Shen fed the raptor.
A shy shiny Spino dashed past Shep and the herd.
Shep and Sharon rushed to shut in the shy Allosaur.
Sharon crushed an Allosaur fossil and Shep sheltered the herd.
Shen dashed to shelter and Sharon sheltered a shy Spino.
Shep and Shen washed the shiny Allosaur dorsal.
Sharon rushed to shelter a shiny shaggy raptor fossil.
Shen saw a shaggy predator and Shep rushed to shelter.
Shep and Sharon sheltered a shiny hadrosaur in the shed.
